name: Syntax Slime
description: A slime born from basic syntax errors

name: Semicolon Wisp
description: A glowing spirit formed by broken punctuation and brackets

name: Null Shadow
description: A shadow born from null references

name: Branch Phantom
description: A phantom that appears when conditional branches go wrong

name: Type-Mismatch Medusa
description: A Medusa that mutates data types and freezes programs

name: Infinite Golem
description: A stone golem trapped in an infinite loop

name: Boundary Hydra
description: A many-headed hydra born from boundary and index errors

name: Flow Architect
description: An architect that builds tangled execution flows

name: Logic Bomb Boss
description: The final boss, combining every logic and flow error type
